title: ElectricalFixture
description: ElectricalFixture: A device used to convey electricity e.g. duplex sockets/receptacles, disconnect/isolator switches (for electrified mechanical equipment), floors boxes.

Location.description: The point in space for the location of the object. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

OrientationAngle.description: Controls the local plan orientation of the object. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

ElectricalFixtureType.description: A type which describes the electrical fixture more specifically whether it's a duplex or quad receptacle/socket, a floor box or a disconnect/isolator switch. ElectricalFixtureType: A type of electrical fixture (duplex/quad socket/receptacle, floor box, or disconnect/isolator switch.)

GroundFaultCircuitInterrupter.description: Ground Fault Circuit Interrupter (GFCI) is a boolean value (true/false) that denotes whether a device is a fast acting circuit breaker designed to shut off power in the event of a ground fault.

WeatherProof.description: Weather Proof is a boolean value (true/false) that denotes whether a device has water/weather tight casting.

Power.description: The power of the electrical fixture described in kilowatts.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
